title: Test: Add mutation testing
original_text: Added mutation testing using mutmut. Configured mutation testing for critical modules. Implemented mutation score thresholds. Added mutation testing in CI/CD pipeline. Implemented mutation test reporting. Added mutation test optimization for faster execution. Result: mutation score 85%.
